# CWE-252 negative: propagates write failure to client
lang: go
file: CWE-252-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-252 Unchecked Return Value (mitigated)
func PersistAudit(c *gin.Context) {
	entry := []byte(c.PostForm("entry"))
	if err := os.WriteFile("/var/log/audit.log", entry, 0o600); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "write"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "stored"})
}
